questions.q: As detailed in an FCC funding request reported on April 28, 2026, what percentage of the newly merged Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery will be foreign-owned?
Announced in late April 2026, Emma Stone and Chris Pine are teaming up for a May 2027 romantic comedy titled what?
On April 28, 2026, which streaming platform officially confirmed that 'Enola Holmes 3' will be released on July 1st?
Which upcoming 2026 comedy film dropped its official trailer in late April, billing itself as the fifth and final main installment of a beloved stunt franchise?
Reported on April 28, 2026, Sony tapped 'L.A. Confidential' writer Brian Helgeland to script a film adaptation of which Quentin Tarantino comic crossover?
options: Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair
